emotional_tone: Premium, calming, authentic, trustworthy, and human.

headings.usage: Use for all main titles, section headers, and hero text to evoke a premium, elegant, and holistic feel. Avoid generic sans-serif for headings.

body.usage: Clean, highly readable text for paragraphs, buttons, and navigation.

labels.usage: Uppercase, wide letter-spacing for subheadings, overlines, and tags.

background.description: Warm sand / Off-white. Never use pure white for the main background to avoid a sterile tech feel.

surface.description: Pure white for cards and floating elements to create crisp contrast against the warm background.

primary.description: Soft Sage / Forest Green. Represents growth, calm, and nature. Use for primary CTAs and important icons.

secondary.description: Terracotta/Earth. Warmth and grounding. Use for accents, active states, or secondary buttons.

text.description: Deep charcoal tinted with green instead of pure black for a softer, organic contrast.

border.description: Subtle, warm grey/beige for dividers and card borders.

visual_enhancers.textures: Consider a very subtle SVG noise overlay (opacity 1-2%) to give the background a tactile, paper-like feel.

layouts_and_spacing.spacing_system: Generous. Use 2-3x typical spacing (e.g., py-24, gap-12). Let elements breathe to simulate a calm environment.
layouts_and_spacing.hero_section: Edge-to-edge landscape background with a soft gradient overlay to ensure text readability. The overlay should be warm (e.g., #F9F6F0/40) rather than a harsh dark gradient.
layouts_and_spacing.bento_grid: For the 'Solution' or 'Benefits' section, use asymmetrical bento grids with large gaps (gap-8) and mix text cards with high-quality practitioner images.
layouts_and_spacing.navbar: Sticky, Glassmorphism. bg-[#F9F6F0]/80 with backdrop-blur-md and a subtle bottom border. Must feel premium and seamless.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary buttons solid Sage Green. Secondary buttons outline with Terracotta or deep charcoal. Smooth hover lift (-translate-y-0.5).
components.cards: White background, rounded-3xl, subtle warm shadow, 1px border of #E2DFD8. Padding must be generous (p-8 or p-10).
components.forms: Inputs should have rounded-xl borders, soft backgrounds (#F4F1EA), and border-color transitioning to Sage Green on focus. No harsh blue rings.
components.accordion: For FAQ. Clean, border-b only, smooth height transitions. Use a plus/minus icon that rotates, colored in Terracotta.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling to give a premium feel.

animations.page_load: Soft fade-ins and gentle upward translations (y: 20 -> 0, duration: 0.8s, ease: easeOut).
animations.scroll_reveal: Staggered fade-ins for cards. Parallax effect for the hero background image.
animations.hover: Cards lift slightly. Images scale up very subtly (scale: 1.03) within an overflow-hidden container.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure Deep Charcoal text over Warm Sand meets WCAG AA standards. Button text must be #FFFFFF on the Sage Green background.
accessibility.focus_rings: Focus states should use the Sage Green color, offset by 2px, to maintain brand consistency while remaining visible.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for all framer-motion animations.

media_and_images.style: Natural, human, warm. High-quality photography. Avoid tech devices, sterile clinical rooms, or cold blue lighting.

images.description: Sunlight beams through tall trees in a peaceful forest setting. Represents growth and calm.
Sun shining through the clouds over a forest.
A woman in therapy, engaged in discussion with a professional therapist. Natural light, warm atmosphere.
A therapist and a client engaging in a counseling session in a bright, modern office.
Professional therapist performing a relaxing hand massage, enhancing wellness.
Hands massaging a person's forearm with gentle pressure.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard raw HTML/Tailwind for layout composition. Do not rely heavily on pre-made Shadcn layout cards if they conflict with the organic, asymmetric spacing.

Ensure the hero section does not use 'generic tech SaaS' layouts (no 50/50 split with a dashboard illustration). Use the forest landscape image as an immersive background, or large organic mask shapes.
For the Pricing Table (Offres), make it look like a high-end spa menu or premium membership tier, not a SaaS pricing grid. Use soft background colors and clear checkmarks.
Icons should be Phosphor Icons (Duotone or Light weights) to match the elegant serif typography. Avoid heavy or cartoonish icons.
Never use pure transparent backgrounds for sticky headers or dropdowns—always use a backdrop blur + tint.
Remove any existing 'tech/software' graphics and replace them with the provided human/nature images.
Update tailwind.config.js with the new color palette, extending the theme rather than replacing base colors completely to avoid breaking Shadcn defaults.
Add font links for Cormorant Garamond and Manrope to the HTML head.
Inject the CSS variables for the color palette in /app/frontend/src/App.css or index.css.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not use dark colors as gradients.
Do not center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is forbidden).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Never apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Target specific properties like opacity, transform, or background-color.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Do not use AI emoji characters for icons.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
